variants: Serena Length has distinguished herself in the study of permafrost ecosystems, earning the professional license known as the Permafrost Lorekeeper Pass. Her academic journey was nurtured by the mentorship of Sable Decker, whose guidance proved invaluable in her research endeavors. Supported by the Pineknoll Creativity Fund, Serena's work has been published in the Pewter Lantern Imprint, making significant contributions to the field. Additionally, she takes on the role of Outreach Lead for Fallowhill Wellness, where she promotes community health and well-being initiatives. Through her multifaceted career, she successfully intertwines academic excellence with civic engagement.
